---
title: "test_cjk_check_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_cjk_check_empire.py"
loc: 42
complexity: 2
logic_score: 3.97
style_score: 3.77
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.87
---

## Intent
The `test_cjk_check_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on MockSovereignVector, __init__, load_core_skills, build_index, search, mock_sovereign_vector, test_successful_cjk_query, test_no_results_for_cjk_query. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via MockSovereignVector, __init__, load_core_skills, build_index, search, mock_sovereign_vector, test_successful_cjk_query, test_no_results_for_cjk_query. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [io](file://io)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.tools.debug](file://src.tools.debug)

### Exports
- `MockSovereignVector`
- `__init__`
- `load_core_skills`
- `build_index`
- `search`
- `mock_sovereign_vector`
- `test_successful_cjk_query`
- `test_no_results_for_cjk_query`
